name: Shoulder MRI
description: MRI of the shoulder for rotator cuff and joint evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the shoulder was performed with T1, T2, and fat-saturated sequences in multiple planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Rotator Cuff
sections.content: Supraspinatus [intact / no tear / no tendinosis]. Infraspinatus [intact]. Subscapularis [intact]. No full-thickness tears.

sections.name: Labrum
sections.content: Glenoid labrum [intact / no tear / no degeneration]. No Bankart lesion.

sections.name: Biceps Tendon
sections.content: Biceps tendon [is in proper position / no subluxation / no tenosynovitis].

impression:
1. No rotator cuff tear.
2. No labral tear.
3. Normal shoulder MRI.
author: RadReport Templates
